overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a character in a long dark coat walking through a snowy mountain valley at night. The character approaches a massive cliff face while a gigantic floating creature with hanging tentacles passes overhead, illuminated by eerie green lanterns along the path.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide snowy mountain valley at night, flanked by snow-covered pine trees. Green glowing lanterns mark the path ahead. Around the 15-second mark, a massive floating creature with dangling tentacles descends into view from the dark sky, hovering over the valley as the character continues toward the distant cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain approach with ancient stone ruins visible

events.description: floating creature passes overhead and drifts toward the left, exiting the frame
stone ruins and walls become visible on the left as the path approaches the cliff base

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the mountain base as the creature passes overhead

notable_agents.action: floating creature drifting directly overhead with tentacles swaying, moving leftward

entered.detail: ancient stone wall ruins partially covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the floating creature passes directly overhead, its tentacles swaying in the air. The valley opens up to reveal ancient stone ruins on the left side. The mountain cliff face grows larger and more detailed as the character approaches, with the path curving slightly toward the stone structures ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path at base of cliff approaching stone archway entrance

events.description: entering the shadow of the cliff face, approaching the dark stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff base toward the dark stone entrance, coat billowing slightly

entered.detail: dark stone archway entrance at the base of the cliff face

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the base of the massive cliff face, the path narrowing as stone walls close in on both sides. The floating creature has disappeared into the distance. The character walks toward a dark stone archway entrance at the cliff base, with the rock wall now dominating the view and the green lanterns marking the final approach to the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain valley at night that gradually narrows into a claustrophobic approach toward a massive cliff face. It begins with a character walking past snow-covered pine trees guided by glowing green lanterns, just as a massive floating creature with dangling tentacles descends from the dark sky to hover over the valley. As the creature passes directly overhead with swaying tentacles, the landscape opens up to reveal ancient stone ruins on the left while the distant cliff face grows larger and more detailed. The scene then shifts as the path curves toward these stone structures and the creature disappears into the distance, leaving the character to enter a narrowing corridor of rock. Finally, the view is dominated by the towering cliff wall as the character follows the green lanterns toward a dark stone archway entrance.
